---
title: "Introduction to Ordination"
author: "Edwin Yánez"
date: "2025-03-20"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
    toc_depth: 4
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Purpose
This is a follow-along document reporting my engagement with Coding Club's [Introduction to Data Clustering](https://ourcodingclub.github.io/tutorials/data-clustering/index.html) tutorial. Not everything in the tutorial should be expected to be replicated here.
